type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Previous assessments assumed all explosive used was site prepared ANFO.  The current assessment uses specific emission factors published by Australia Environment in their NPI EET for explosives detonation for the various explosives used by the facility.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The waste rock handled by the facility is inert based on the guidance provided in the NPRI toolbox.  The average NP/AP ratio of the waste rock is 70.2:1.  As such, quantities of selenium in waste rock were excluded from the inventory for the site.
